---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Start a new game
2. Remove '...' from row '...'
3. End turn / press '...'
4. See the problem

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen (e.g. "taking the last bird should make me lose").

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15]
- Difficulty: [Perfect / Easy]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
